post_impl_findings.summary: [post-impl] validate_evidence_record missing type checks for exit_code, duration_ms, tier, tool_version, raw_output_ref
post_impl_findings.fix: Added type and range checks for all fields

post_impl_findings.summary: [post-impl] LLM evidence confidence/rationale not validated on disk load
post_impl_findings.fix: validate_evidence_record now checks confidence/rationale when deterministic=False

post_impl_findings.summary: [post-impl] validate_gate_file does not validate optional string fields (evidence_bundle_hash, scanner_data_snapshot)
post_impl_findings.rationale: Factory functions set defaults; deep validation added in M18 adjudicator
All waiver timestamps are factory-generated with Z suffix; edge case surfaces clearly as TypeError

production_findings.summary: [production] Write path does not call validate_schema_version
production_findings.fix: validate_evidence_record and validate_gate_file now call validate_schema_version

production_findings.summary: [production] evidence_filename does not sanitize '..' in components
[production] load_evidence_bundle only validates schema_version, not full record
production_findings.fix: Now calls validate_evidence_record on each loaded record

production_findings.summary: [production] File reads do not catch OSError
production_findings.fix: Wrapped path.read_text in try/except OSError with clean error messages

production_findings.rationale: Python 3.11 fromisoformat handles +HH:MM; all factory timestamps use Z suffix

production_findings.fix: Added docstring clarifying it is a deterministic integrity check

production_findings.summary: [production] evidence_migrate does not re-validate after migration
production_findings.rationale: v1→v1 is passthrough; future migration branches should add validation

spec_gaps.summary: Invariant registry: concrete entries for MSME (DG-12, DG-13, DG-14, DG-25, DG-34, DG-4-L1) in invariants.yaml
spec_gaps.note: Already present in M1 foundation — all 6 entries with FAIL severity

spec_gaps.summary: Invariant registry: FAIL-severity invariant violation is a hard FAIL with no CONCERNS path
Invariant registry: encodes ADRs > corrections > vision precedence
spec_gaps.note: Header comment documents precedence rule; all entries are DG-level (ADR-derived)

spec_gaps.summary: cost_tier: cost_to_serve rule function renders CONCERNS (not FAIL) until DG-2 SKU is defined
NA opt-out: Adjudicator emits per-category verdict NA with rationale 'profile-declared N/A'
Gate file hash-chained into the existing audit log
spec_gaps.rationale: Requires audit.py changes; audit.py is in the untouched-files list for M2

spec_gaps.summary: Performance: code-altitude gate runs per-story complete in ≤ 10 minutes wall-clock on diff-scoped happy path
spec_gaps.rationale: Requires full orchestration pipeline (M19) to measure

spec_gaps.summary: Observability: every gate emits a GateDecision telemetry event
spec_gaps.rationale: telemetry_events.py is off-limits per M2 plan; GateDecision lands in M18

spec_gaps.summary: Observability: every gate emits a GateRendered audit event hash-chained into existing HMAC audit log
spec_gaps.rationale: telemetry_events.py and audit.py are off-limits per M2 plan; lands in M18

spec_gaps.summary: Observability: CLI story-automator gate status lists in-flight + PARKED stories
spec_gaps.rationale: CLI ships with M19 orchestrator wiring

spec_gaps.summary: Security: collectors run in trust boundary the generation child cannot write to (§7)
spec_gaps.rationale: Trust boundary enforcement is M16 Factory Self-Trust milestone

spec_gaps.summary: Auditability: every state mutation hash-chains into audit.jsonl
spec_gaps.rationale: Requires audit.py integration; off-limits in M2

spec_gaps.summary: Auditability: audit-verify confirms integrity of gate audit entries
spec_gaps.rationale: Requires audit.py integration; off-limits in M2

spec_gaps.summary: Auditability: tamper detection on the first broken link in gate audit chain
spec_gaps.rationale: Requires audit.py integration; off-limits in M2
